evidence: SKILL.md:163 exploration-orthogonal roster lists 12 members and excludes Aristotle, but council-aristotle.md:14 declares profiles: ["classic", "exploration-orthogonal"]
pattern: profiles frontmatter vs SKILL.md member roster
description: Aristotle's frontmatter claims exploration-orthogonal profile membership but SKILL.md's canonical 12-member roster for that profile omits Aristotle
suggested_fix: Add Aristotle to the exploration-orthogonal Members list in SKILL.md:163, or remove exploration-orthogonal from council-aristotle.md's profiles array

evidence: council-sutskever.md:11 polarity_pairs includes machiavelli and SKILL.md:147 documents Sutskever vs Machiavelli as a duo pair, but council-machiavelli.md:11 polarity_pairs is only ["ada"]
description: machiavelli's polarity_pairs omits sutskever even though sutskever declares machiavelli and SKILL.md documents the pair, risking a silent miss in the auto-routing hard-constraint check
suggested_fix: Add sutskever to council-machiavelli.md's polarity_pairs array

pattern: no explicit empty-argument branch in STEP 0
description: SKILL.md never defines behavior when /council is invoked with no problem statement; STEP 0 Auto-Triad Selection assumes problem text to match against triad keywords
suggested_fix: Add an explicit STEP 0 check: if no problem text is supplied, prompt the user for one instead of proceeding to auto-triad selection on an empty string

description: codex_exec dispatch runs with auto_approve=true and no read-only restriction, unlike the explicit --mode ask restriction applied to the cursor_cli seat a few paragraphs later, so a reasoning-only council member isn't tooling-restricted
suggested_fix: Restrict codex_exec to a non-mutating/read-only mode or drop auto_approve=true so council members can't silently take write actions

description: gemini_cli dispatch has no read-only/no-tool-use flag equivalent to cursor_cli's --mode ask, so a dispatched Gemini council member isn't tooling-restricted to analysis-only
suggested_fix: Add an explicit read-only/no-tool-use flag to the gemini invocation, mirroring cursor_cli's --mode ask pattern

pattern: curl network call with credential via process substitution
description: Legitimate reachability check against the NIM catalog endpoint; credential passed via process substitution to avoid ps exposure, which is the correct pattern — recorded for completeness, no fix needed

evidence: sys.exit message reads 'pip3 install --user pyyaml' with no version constraint
description: Install hint for PyYAML has no version pin, so a future breaking PyYAML release could silently change parsing behavior
suggested_fix: Pin the suggested install command, e.g. pip3 install --user "pyyaml>=6.0,<7"

description: Zero example blocks in description (R09 -15); Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, WebSearch, WebFetch declared but never referenced in body (R11 -18)
suggested_fix: Add 2+ <example> blocks to the description; drop or actually use the declared tools

description: CLAUDE.md documents project architecture directly rather than importing an AGENTS.md; no AGENTS.md exists in this repo, which deviates from nlpm's own AGENTS.md-as-canonical-memory convention but is not a scored penalty under the rubric applied here
